mapper.sql: id, operation_type, operation_desc, operation_param, user_id, user_name, ip_address, operation_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fail_count, AVG(execution_time) as avg_execution_time, MAX(operation_time) as last_operation_time FROM sys_operation_log WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND operation_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT operation_type, description, COUNT(*) as operation_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, AVG(execution_time) as avg_time FROM sys_operation_log WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND operation_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY operation_type, description ORDER BY operation_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT user_name, user_id, COUNT(*) as operation_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, MIN(operation_time) as first_operation, MAX(operation_time) as last_operation FROM sys_operation_log WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND operation_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY user_name, user_id ORDER BY operation_count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(module, 'unknown') as module_name, COUNT(*) as operation_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, AVG(execution_time) as avg_execution_time FROM sys_operation_log WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND operation_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY module_name ORDER BY operation_count DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_operation_log SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_operation_log WHERE is_deleted = 1 OR operation_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
